steps.title: Identify the goal
steps.content: The student wants to show that Ecuador has different types of volcanoes. The correct example must list two Ecuadorian volcanoes that are different types from each other (per the table).

steps.title: Match the table
steps.content:
Choice D pairs Cuicocha (caldera) with Cayambe (compound) — two different types in Ecuador.

A and C include Alcedo, which is in the Galápagos (not mainland Ecuador in the relevant grouping) or misclassifies a type. B misidentifies Cuicocha's type. Only D gives two correctly-typed Ecuadorian volcanoes that differ from each other.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
